basics.name: Riffat Wyne
basics.label: AI Certified Technical Writer | Documentation Manager | Docs-as-code
basics.summary: Highly experienced Documentation Manager and Senior Technical Writer with expertise in Knowledge Management, Information Architecture, and AI. Proven track record managing globally distributed teams of technical writers, implementing documentation strategies, and driving continuous improvements in product documentation processes. Strong leadership, relationship-building, and decision-making skills with extensive experience in single-source publishing, topic-based authoring, and content management systems.

work.name: Getinge
work.summary: Define vision and strategies for product documentation across DHS in Getinge within R&D. Lead people management with resource planning and adherence to deadlines and budgets. Implement AI writing assistants, Claude Code, and localization workflows.
highlights: Unified Getinge delivering product documentation across multiple products in DHS division
Implemented Document360, Azure DevOps, MadCap Flare, Confluence, Notion, and Crowdin for documentation tools
Drove improvements in product documentation processes, approval flows, and cross-functional interfaces through alignment and standardization
Managed recruitment process and strategic development planning for technical writing team members

work.name: Bühler Group
work.summary: Aligned technical documentation across Business Units in Denmark, Austria, and Switzerland. Managed and mentored globally distributed team of technical writers. Implemented EDMS and continuously improved documentation processes.
highlights: Implemented EDMS (Electronic Document Management System) through stakeholder requirement gathering and requirements specifications preparation
Managed and mentored a globally distributed team of Technical Writers across 3 countries
Created yearly Technical Documentation department Transformation cards to forecast team needs and departmental improvements
Continuously improved technical documentation in collaboration with Engineering, Product Management, and R&D departments

work.name: Bühler Group
work.summary: Prepared technical documentation including operating instructions, control panels manuals, installation guides, and wiring diagrams. Managed spare parts catalogues from SAP and coordinated translations with external agencies.
highlights: Developed documentation for new machinery and accessories with mechanical and electrical equipment expertise
Prepared Operating Instructions manuals and Control Panels manuals for industrial equipment
Coordinated translations with external translation agencies and managed CMS imports/exports
Supported Engineering and R&D management serving as interface between engineers, designers, and customers

work.name: CapaSystems A/S
work.summary: Responsible for technical documentation of PerformanceGuard software. Developed and maintained online help, eLearning content, and API documentation. Implemented single-source publishing and topic-based authoring with MadCap Flare.
highlights: Developed and maintained Online-Help and eLearning materials for PerformanceGuard software
Implemented single-source publishing and topic-based authoring using MadCap Flare, Analyzer, and Lingo
Created API documentation and Swagger specifications for software developers
Managed translation memory, localization, and pseudolocalization across multiple language releases

work.name: Atea Danmark
work.summary: Responsible for QA and documentation quality control. Defined standard templates for Service Catalog and established agreements with SMEs aligned with project obligations.
highlights: Performed overall quality control review of technical documentation to ensure compliance with standards and contractual obligations
Defined standard templates for Service Catalog documentation across organization
Reviewed, updated, and validated technical documentation from multiple departments
Established SME agreements aligned with project obligations, work breakdown structures, and quality requirements

work.name: Atea Danmark
work.summary: Managed communication and content coordination for HTML/CSS web updates. Created service catalog documentation and described ITIL process roles. Wrote help text and system instructions.
highlights: Managed multiple deliverables and projects simultaneously as Project Manager
Created documentation for CSMS describing 5 ITIL Processes (Problem, Change, Incident, Project & Assignment, Service Request & Catalogue, Service Agreement Management)
Developed Service Catalog product sheet templates and value parameters documents for multiple concepts and services
Authored ServiceNow procedures and work instructions for service delivery operations

Produced newsletters, banners, brochures, and promotional content for fundraising campaigns
Managed Facebook page and social media content for community engagement
Edited video and audio materials using multimedia production tools

work.name: Atea
work.summary: Responsible for technical documentation across multiple domains including Service Desk, IT infrastructure, and system operations. Experienced with IT service management tools and ITIL processes.

Produced SOP documentation, troubleshooting guides, and installation/maintenance guides for IT operations
